partners.title: Feltrip Local Picks
partners.subtitle: Connect with vetted professionals to support your relocation
partners.curatorshipIntro: The service, company, and professional references presented by Feltrip are part of an informative and independent curation, based on qualitative and public criteria, including:
partners.criteria1: Information available on open platforms (such as Google and Google Reviews)
partners.criteria2: Public or recurring recommendations in the ecosystem of foreigners and people in the process of adapting in Brazil
partners.criteria3: Referrals from people close to and trusted by the Feltrip network
partners.criteria4: Perception of coherence between the price charged and average market values in the city or local territory
partners.criteria5: Track record of working in the specific context of cultural adaptation, relocation or welcoming
partners.individualNote: When there is a referral to individuals, these are exclusively professionals whose work Feltrip has already gotten to know more closely, through direct experiences, process monitoring or consistent references — without this constituting a commercial link, formal partnership or guarantee of results.
partners.noIntermediationNote: Feltrip does not intermediate services, does not receive commissions, does not participate in negotiations and is not responsible for contracts, values, deadlines or results arising from the hiring of third parties. Experiences vary according to the profile, needs and context of each person.
partners.disclaimerText: These are professionals that Feltrip has interviewed and verified. We carefully select who participates in this directory.
partners.disclaimerNote: We are not responsible for negotiations and do not receive any commission. Please conduct your own due diligence before engaging services.
partners.noPartnersFound: No partners found with the selected filters
partners.healthNote: We recommend trusted professionals specialized in intercultural realities and adaptation.
partners.helpExpandNetwork: Help us expand our network by referring trusted professionals you've worked with.
partners.whyRecommend: Why do you recommend this partner?

presence.howAreYouFeeling: What does the city have for you today?
presence.exploreYourPillars: Two paths to experience the city for real:
presence.pillarsListText: Body, The Other, Territory, Space and Identity
presence.modelDescription: For observing relational presence in adaptation and belonging processes.
presence.methodDescription: Observation through phenomenological self-assessments (bodily, emotional and symbolic perception), mediated by Feltrip™ oriented practices.
presence.aboutBobaDescription: Learn about your presence guardian and the 5 pillars
presence.radarDescription: How you're feeling in each dimension
presence.weeklyLimitDesc: You can take the questionnaire up to 2 times per week. Please wait until next week.
presence.modelDesc: For observing relational presence in adaptation and belonging processes.
presence.methodDesc: Observation through phenomenological self-assessments (bodily, emotional and symbolic perception), mediated by Feltrip™ oriented practices.
presence.aboutBobaDesc: Learn about your presence guardian and the 5 pillars
presence.chooseExploration: Choose how you want to explore your presence today
presence.mrpWorkplaceDescription: Here you can share how your work experience is going, so leadership can offer support and organizational improvements.
presence.confidentialDescription: This is a safe and private space. Your conversations with Boba are confidential and are not shared with HR or leadership.
presence.cultConfidentialDesc: This is a 100% safe and private environment. Your questions and discoveries with Cultura are confidential and not shared with your company.
presence.cultCompassDesc: Access real insights and hidden layers of cities — Rio de Janeiro, São Paulo and Florianópolis. Use this space to ask for gems, places and practical tips calibrated with your vibe today.
presence.cultNotGenericAI: Cult is not a generic AI; it's a living curation by Feltrip, nourished by academic research and lived experience in the territories so you know exactly where to go and how to belong.
presence.cultCredits: You have <bold>10</bold> conversations/month with Cult AI available
presence.howYouFeelInEachDimension: How you're feeling in each dimension
presence.bodyDesc: Physical awareness, sensations, health, energy and vitality in the new environment.
presence.spaceDesc: Relationship with intimate and private environments, sense of belonging in personal spaces.
presence.territoryDesc: Connection with geographical place, exploration, belonging to surroundings.
presence.theOtherDesc: Relational bonds, social connections, quality of human interactions.
presence.identityDesc: Self-image, personal values, sense of self during adaptation.
presence.yourResponsesHelp: Your responses help create your personal Relational Presence Map.
presence.shareConsentDesc: I consent to share only my 5-pillar percentages (Body, Space, Territory, The Other, Identity) with my organization's HR dashboard. No question details, answers, or conversations with Boba will ever be shared — those remain completely private and encrypted.
presence.chooseHowMuchAgree: Choose how much you agree with this statement.
presence.bobaIntro1a: When engaging with Boba, users can choose how they want to interact: exploring
presence.bobaIntro1c: in a broader sense, accessing specific
presence.bobaIntro1d: local insights and hidden layers of cities
presence.bobaIntro1e: — currently Rio de Janeiro and São Paulo — or creating their own
presence.bobaIntro1g: , a reflective framework that works across five core pillars:
presence.bobaIntro1m: the spaces of home and work
presence.bobaIntro2a: Boba takes her name from the
presence.bobaIntro2c: — a playful yet insightful figure allowed to move across hierarchies and speak freely, offering perspectives that connect leadership and teams alike. She is not a generic AI, but a
presence.bobaIntro2e: , continuously refined through weekly dialogue and nourished with highly specific materials grounded in academic research, cultural studies, and lived experience.
presence.signInToSave: Please sign in to save your questionnaire.

workplace.confirmDescription: Your workplace presence assessment is complete.
workplace.hrNotice: Important: This assessment is shared with HR

workplace.hrNoticeDescription: The MRP-WORKPLACE results are always shared with your HR team to help identify areas for workplace improvement and support your well-being. Only aggregate scores are shared, not individual answer details.

onboarding.step1Content1: In every city, in every transition, there is a moment of arrival.
onboarding.step1Content2: It's not about maps, documents, or logistics. It's about
onboarding.step1Content4: — and how your body lands in the world.
onboarding.step1Content7: I'm here to walk with you through the first steps of this new landscape.
onboarding.step2Title: Let's Observe What Lives in You Now
onboarding.step2Content1: I will guide you through five dimensions that shape any adaptation process:
onboarding.step2Content2: Body, Territory, Identity, Space, and The Other.
onboarding.step2Content3: You respond with calm. I welcome, interpret, and transform your perceptions into a
onboarding.step2Content5: — a living portrait of how you are arriving in the world.
onboarding.step3Title: No Rush. No Right or Wrong. Just Presence.
onboarding.step3Content1: Here, adaptation is not a test. It's
onboarding.step3Content5: inspired by art, performance, and relational aesthetics — small rituals to expand your attention and soften your journey.
onboarding.step3Content6: When you're ready, we enter my home. There, the journey begins.

body: I feel physically prepared for the changes ahead.
I'm aware of how my body responds to uncertainty.
I trust my body's ability to adapt to new environments.
space: I can imagine myself feeling comfortable in a new personal space.
I'm ready to create a sense of home in an unfamiliar place.
I feel open to redefining what 'my space' means.
territory: I'm excited to explore a new geographical territory.
I feel curious about the surroundings of my future location.
I believe I can develop a sense of belonging to a new place.
other: I feel ready to build new social connections.
I'm open to different ways of relating to people.
I trust my ability to form meaningful relationships in new contexts.
identity: I have a clear sense of who I am, regardless of location.
I'm curious about how this change might help me grow.
I feel confident in my core values during transitions.

body: My body feels at ease in this environment.
I'm able to maintain healthy routines here.
I notice positive physical sensations in my daily life.
space: My current living space feels like home.
I've created personal corners that bring me comfort.
I feel safe and comfortable in my private environment.
territory: I feel connected to the city/region where I live.
I feel a sense of belonging to this geographical place.
other: I have meaningful social connections here.
I feel understood in my interactions with others.
I'm building relationships that nourish me.
identity: I feel authentic in how I present myself here.
This experience is helping me understand myself better.
I maintain my core identity while embracing growth.

body: My body feels ready for another transition.
I've learned to listen to my physical needs during this experience.
I feel physically stronger than when I arrived.
space: I'm able to let go of the spaces I created here.
I carry a sense of 'home' within myself now.
I'm ready to create new personal spaces elsewhere.
territory: I feel grateful for the territory I explored here.
I'll carry memories of this place with me.
I'm ready to embrace a new geographical territory.
other: I've learned valuable lessons about relationships here.
I feel connected to people despite physical distance.
I'm confident in building new connections in the future.
identity: This experience has enriched my sense of identity.
I know myself better now than when I arrived.
I feel ready for the next chapter of my journey.

space: I feel that my work environment is safe and adequate for my activities.
The physical space where I work supports focus and well-being.
The environmental elements (light, sound, temperature, ergonomics) do not hinder my presence.
body: My body stays comfortable and regulated throughout the workday.
I am able to take enough breaks to maintain energy and attention.
My body is not operating in constant alertness, tension, or exhaustion.
other: I feel I can express doubts, boundaries, and needs without fear.
My relationships with colleagues and leadership are respectful and collaborative.
I receive adequate support when facing challenges or conflicts.
culture: I clearly understand what is expected of me in my role and tasks.
I perceive coherence between the values the company communicates and daily practices.
The pressure for results is balanced and does not exceed healthy limits.
belonging: I feel I am part of the company and understand my place within the collective.
I receive support during changes, adaptations, and new work contexts.
I can be myself in the professional environment, without having to mask emotions or identity.
responsibility: I actively reflect on how my actions impact my team and workplace.
I acknowledge areas where I can improve and take steps toward that improvement.
I give my best at work, even when facing difficulties or discomfort.
I take responsibility for my behavior instead of placing blame on others.
I am open to feedback and use it constructively to evolve.

pillarExplanations.Identity: Self-image, personal values, sense of self during adaptation.
